lockingPolicy.lockReason: Regression scenarios encode the observability contract for 5 gkeepapi attribute-access failure points; any future change requires explicit invalidation evidence per Gate G058/G059.

tdd.rationale: This IS a code change (5 except-pass blocks replaced + new pytest file); NOT artifact-only. Red→Green evidence mandatory.
tdd.redGreenEvidence: Red: 6 new pytest cases in ml/tests/test_keep_bridge_warnings.py MUST FAIL against pre-fix tree (0 WARNINGs captured). Green: after replacing 5 except-pass with except-as-exc + logger.warning and splitting timestamps try-block, all 7 cases pass and 5 distinct WARNINGs are captured.

scenarios.title: serialize_note logs WARNING when labels.all raises
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Mock gnote.labels.all to raise AttributeError; serialize_note runs; caplog captures exactly 1 WARNING from smackerel-ml.keep-bridge naming 'labels'; result['labels']==[].

scenarios.title: serialize_note logs WARNING when collaborators.all raises
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Mock gnote.collaborators.all to raise RuntimeError; caplog captures exactly 1 WARNING naming 'collaborators'; result['collaborators']==[].

scenarios.title: serialize_note logs WARNING when items iteration raises
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: PropertyMock on gnote.items raises TypeError; caplog captures exactly 1 WARNING naming 'list_items'; result['list_items']==[].

scenarios.title: serialize_note logs WARNING when timestamps.updated raises
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Real class with @property raising AttributeError on updated; caplog captures exactly 1 WARNING naming 'timestamps.updated'; result['modified_usec']==0.

scenarios.title: serialize_note logs WARNING when timestamps.created raises
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Real class with @property raising AttributeError on created; caplog captures exactly 1 WARNING naming 'timestamps.created'; result['created_usec']==0. Independent split try-block proves no cross-failure masking.

scenarios.title: All five failure points trigger five distinct WARNING records
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: All 5 failure paths active simultaneously; caplog captures exactly 5 WARNING records with all 5 distinct context tokens (labels, collaborators, list_items, timestamps.updated, timestamps.created); serialize_note does not raise; fallback shape preserved.
